title: STING / Pancreatic Cancer
executive_summary: STING pathway agonism shows preclinical PDAC relevance with early-phase clinical exploration; efficacy and biomarker strategy remain key uncertainties.

sections.title: Mechanism
sections.content: STING activation may enhance innate immune signaling in PDAC models.

sections.title: Clinical landscape
sections.content: NCT05234567 evaluates a STING agonist in advanced PDAC.

diligence_questions: What combination regimen maximizes STING pathway engagement in PDAC?
